papers.title_en: Ultrasound Domain Adaptation for Robust Kidney Segmentation via Spectral-Similarity-Guided Translation
papers.tldr: 针对超声设备和中心差异导致的肾脏分割域偏移问题，本文提出了一种基于频谱相似性引导翻译的域自适应方法。该方法通过在图像翻译过程中引入频谱约束，有效缓解了灰度、对比度和斑点纹理的差异，显著提高了跨域肾脏分割的鲁棒性，为临床测量和辅助诊断提供了更准确的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate kidney ultrasound segmentation is fundamental for clinical measurementand computer-aided diagnosis. However, domain shifts across devices and centers—manifested as differences in grayscale intensity, contrast, and speckle texture …

papers.title_en: Redundancy-adaptive dual memory network for knowledge-enhanced ultrasound report generation
papers.tldr: 超声报告自动生成旨在减轻临床医生负担，但从图像生成准确连贯的报告仍具挑战。本文提出一种冗余自适应双记忆网络（RADM-Net），通过引入外部医学知识和双记忆机制来增强特征表示。该方法能有效处理超声图像中的冗余信息，提升报告的临床准确性与逻辑性。实验证明该模型在多个指标上优于现有方法，为自动化超声诊断提供了重要技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Ultrasound (US) report generation aims to alleviate the burden on clinicians and hasemerged as a significant research focus. However, automatically generatingclinically accurate and coherent reports from US images remains challenging due to …

papers.title_en: DELRER: Disease Evolution-Informed Longitudinal Radiology Report Generation
papers.tldr: 自动放射科报告生成（RRG）能减轻医生负担，而纵向报告生成（LRRG）通过利用患者的历史随访检查提供更准确的诊断。本文提出DELRER模型，旨在利用疾病演变信息来增强纵向放射报告的生成质量。该方法通过整合患者随访过程中的时间演变特征，提升了报告的准确性和临床一致性，为临床决策提供了更具参考价值的自动化工具。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Auto Radiology Report Generation (RRG) can effectively help relieve theworkload of radiologists. Based on this, Longitudinal Radiology Report Generation(LRRG) utilizes patients' longitudinal follow-up radiology examinations to provide a …

papers.title_en: Multi-view Chest X-Ray Vision-Language Pre-training via Semantic-Aware Masked Language Modeling and High-order Alignment
papers.tldr: 本研究针对胸部X射线影像与报告的联合表示学习，提出了一种多视图视觉语言预训练框架。该方法通过引入语义感知掩码语言建模（MLM）和高阶对齐技术，有效整合了多视图影像特征并增强了图文间的细粒度语义关联。实验证明，该方法在多项医学影像诊断任务中表现优异，显著提升了跨模态特征的对齐精度和临床应用潜力。
papers.abstract_en: Chest X-Ray Vision-Language pretraining (VLP) leverages large-scale radiograph-report pairs to develop joint image-text representations, demonstrating significantpotential for medical image diagnosis. However, existing VLP approaches often …

papers.title_en: Mix-to-Max: Optimizing Data Mixtures for Peak Vision-Language Efficiency
papers.tldr: 本文针对视觉指令微调（VIT）中数据冗余导致的计算资源浪费问题，提出了 Mix-to-Max 框架。该框架通过优化不同任务数据的混合比例，旨在以更低的数据成本实现大视觉语言模型（LVLM）的性能最大化。研究证明，通过精细化管理数据混合，可以在显著提升训练效率的同时，保持模型在多样化视觉任务中的强大泛化能力。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Visual Instruction Tuning (VIT) endows Large Vision-Language Models(LVLMs) with powerful generalization capabilities across diverse visual tasks.However, the redundancy present in VIT data leads to substantial computational …

papers.title_en: Beyond Inconsistent Reasoning: Intermediate Process Direct Preference Optimization on Small Multi-modal Large Language Models for Visual Question Answering
papers.tldr: 针对小型多模态大模型在视觉问答中推理过程与结果不一致的问题，本文提出了中间过程直接偏好优化（IP-DPO）方法。该方法通过对多模态链式思考的中间推理步骤进行细粒度的偏好对齐，引导模型学习正确的逻辑路径，在不增加模型参数量的前提下，显著提升了小型模型在复杂视觉推理任务中的表现和逻辑一致性。
papers.abstract_en: Visual Question Answering (VQA) has increasingly shifted from direct prediction tostep-by-step reasoning, driven by advances in Multi-modal Large Language Models(MLLMs) and Multi-modal Chain-of-Thought (MCoT). However, small MLLMs (S …

papers.title_en: Fine-Tuning Enhances Latent Metacognitive Capability in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了大语言模型判断自身知识边界的元认知能力。研究者提出模型内部已存在支持自我判断的潜在结构，并通过微调实验验证了这一假设。结果表明，微调能有效激活并增强模型的元认知表现，使其能更准确地识别自身无法回答的问题，为提升模型诚实度与可靠性提供了重要依据。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models are increasingly asked not only to answer questions, butalso to judge whether they know enough to answer. We test a latent metacognitivecapability hypothesis: models already contain internal structure supporting weak self …

papers.title_en: Rubric-Grounded Reinforcement Learning: Structured Judge Rewards for Generalizable Reasoning in Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究提出了一种基于评分量表（Rubric）的强化学习方法（R-RL），旨在解决复杂推理任务中奖励信号过于单一的问题。该方法将奖励分解为多个加权且可验证的准则，利用LLM裁判根据量表对模型回答进行多维度评分。这种“部分学分”式的优化信号比传统的二元或整体评分更精细，显著提升了语言模型在推理任务中的泛化能力和学习效率。
papers.abstract_en: We argue that decomposing reward into weighted, verifiable criteria and using anLLM judge to score them provides a partial-credit optimization signal: instead of abinary outcome or a single holistic score, each response is graded along multiple …

papers.title_en: Multiparametric MRI-Based Habitat Radiomics Combined with Deep Transfer Learning for Predicting Extrathyroidal Extension in Papillary Thyroid Carcinoma
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在开发并验证一种基于多参数MRI（mpMRI）的预测模型，用于术前评估乳头状甲状腺癌（PTC）的腺外侵犯（ETE）。该方法创新性地整合了生境影像组学、深度迁移学习（DTL）以及定量参数，通过挖掘肿瘤内部异质性提升预测性能。研究结果证明了该多模态融合模型在无创预测ETE方面的临床价值，为优化手术决策提供了重要依据。
papers.abstract_en: The objective of the study is to develop and validate a multiparametric MRI (mpMRI)-based model that integrated with habitat-based radiomics, deep transfer learning(DTL), and quantitative parameters for the preoperative prediction of extrathyroidal …

papers.title_en: LoMo: Local Modality Substitution for Deeper Vision-Language Fusion
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉语言模型在多模态融合深度上的不足，提出了LoMo（局部模态替换）方法。该方法通过在训练过程中对局部模态进行替换，促使模型更深入地理解图像与文本之间的对应关系。实验表明，LoMo能显著提升模型在复杂理解和推理任务中的表现，为实现更深层次的跨模态融合提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved substantial progress across a widerange of understanding and reasoning tasks, driven by large-scale image-texttraining aimed at multimodal fusion. Ideally, replacing a textual question with its …

papers.title_en: DARTS: Distribution-Aware Active Rollout Trajectory Shaping for Accelerating LLM Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 强化学习在提升大语言模型能力方面至关重要，但响应长度的长尾分布导致了严重的Rollout效率瓶颈。本文提出DARTS（分布感知主动Rollout轨迹整形）框架，通过动态感知生成分布并主动干预轨迹形状，旨在优化计算资源分配并加速训练过程。该方法超越了传统的提示词级优化，从轨迹生成的维度提升了LLM强化学习的整体效率。
papers.abstract_en: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has become pivotal for improving model capabilitiesyet suffers from rollout efficiency bottlenecks due to the long-tail response lengthdistribution. While existing works mitigate the impact of long tails via prompt-level tail …

papers.title_en: ClinicalMC: A Benchmark for Multi-Course Clinical Decision-Making with Large Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在复杂临床决策中面临的挑战，提出了ClinicalMC基准测试。现有评估多集中于单阶段场景，而该基准专注于多阶段临床决策过程。通过构建包含多轮诊疗逻辑的数据集，研究者评估了主流模型在处理动态、长程医疗任务时的表现，为提升LLM在实际医疗环境中的应用能力提供了重要参考和评估工具。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) have been widely adopted in healthcare, yet theystill encounter significant challenges in complex clinical decision-making scenarios.Existing benchmarks primarily assess LLM performance in single-course settings …

papers.title_en: RL Excursions during Pre-Training: Re-examining Policy Optimization for LLM training
papers.tldr: 本研究挑战了LLM仅在预训练和SFT后才进行强化学习（RL）的传统范式。通过从零开始训练模型，并直接应用RL、SFT及其组合，探讨了在预训练阶段引入策略优化的可行性。研究表明，RL不应仅被视为微调工具，其在模型开发早期同样具有重要价值，为优化LLM训练流程提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: The standard LLM training pipeline applies reinforcement learning (RL) only after pre-training and supervised fine-tuning (SFT). We question this status quo by training aLLM from scratch and applying RL, SFT, and SFT followed by RL directly to …

papers.title_en: PerceptionDLM: Parallel Region Perception with Multimodal Diffusion Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对现有自回归多模态大模型在处理多区域感知任务时效率受限的问题，本文提出了 PerceptionDLM。该模型利用扩散语言模型实现了并行区域感知，能够同时进行区域描述和定位。实验表明，PerceptionDLM 在保证理解准确性的前提下，大幅提升了推理速度，为高效的多模态视觉感知任务提供了一种创新的并行生成方案。
papers.abstract_en: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress invisual understanding tasks. However, most existing MLLMs rely on autoregressivegeneration, which limits their efficiency for perception tasks that require captioning …
